# apisguru

A client to interact with the [APIs.guru](https://apis.guru) API.

## Installation

You can install the development version of apisguru from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("jonthegeek/apisguru")
```

## Made with {beekeeper}

This package is being developed using the
[{beekeeper}](https://beekeeper.api2r.org/) package. Development is very
active, and this package will likely change a lot in the coming weeks.
As part of the development of {beekeeper}, I’m updating this package
manually to define what {beekeeper} should create.

## Code of Conduct

Please note that the apisguru project is released with a [Contributor
Code of
Conduct](https://jonthegeek.github.io/apisguru/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.html). By
contributing to this project, you agree to abide by its terms.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`call_guru_api()`](https://jonthegeek.github.io/apisguru/reference/call_guru_api.md)
  : Call the APIs.guru API
- [`get_api()`](https://jonthegeek.github.io/apisguru/reference/get_api.md)
  : Retrieve one version of a particular API
- [`get_metrics()`](https://jonthegeek.github.io/apisguru/reference/get_metrics.md)
  : Get basic metrics
- [`get_provider()`](https://jonthegeek.github.io/apisguru/reference/get_provider.md)
  : List all APIs for a particular provider
- [`get_providers()`](https://jonthegeek.github.io/apisguru/reference/get_providers.md)
  : List all providers
- [`get_service_api()`](https://jonthegeek.github.io/apisguru/reference/get_service_api.md)
  : Retrieve one version of a particular API with a serviceName.
- [`get_services()`](https://jonthegeek.github.io/apisguru/reference/get_services.md)
  : List all serviceNames for a particular provider
- [`list_apis()`](https://jonthegeek.github.io/apisguru/reference/list_apis.md)
  : List all APIs
- [`schema_api_version()`](https://jonthegeek.github.io/apisguru/reference/schema_api_version.md)
  : Description of one version of an API
- [`schema_api_versions()`](https://jonthegeek.github.io/apisguru/reference/schema_api_versions.md)
  : Description of all version of an API
- [`schema_apis()`](https://jonthegeek.github.io/apisguru/reference/schema_apis.md)
  : Meta information about APIs
- [`schema_metrics()`](https://jonthegeek.github.io/apisguru/reference/schema_metrics.md)
  : List of basic metrics
